display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official homepage identify the project as pass, the standard Unix password manager.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official passwordstore.org site and primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is from git.zx2c4.com/password-store, the official upstream source-control host.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage identify pass as a password manager; source_facts.executables identifies CLI.
